lines.speaker: Rimae Sirsalis
lines.text: Welcome to the clothes store. How might I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a very interesting island you have here.

lines.speaker: Rimae Sirsalis
lines.text: Why thank you. It's been our haven for a great many generations.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Everything seems to have a magical feel to it.

lines.speaker: Rimae Sirsalis
lines.text: Of course. We integrate magic into all areas of our lives. It is a part of everyone, so why deny it? It's best to make the most of this innate gift we have all been given.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of things do you use your magic for?

lines.speaker: Rimae Sirsalis
lines.text: Take a look around. We use it in our day to day lives, from making a cup of tea, to travelling around the island. You see our ancestors were the ones that found the first rune essence and put it to use! The various

lines.speaker: Rimae Sirsalis
lines.text: factions were eventually created, with people having different ideas on how the essence should be used (or not in some cases!)

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What has kept you so secluded on this island?

lines.speaker: Rimae Sirsalis
lines.text: It may be a bit beyond you, but although magic comes from within, we are all very strongly linked to the moon and the effects it has on us cannot be denied!

lines.speaker: Rimae Sirsalis
lines.text: Of course not. This very island has a great link to our moon, which helps us understand ourselves - especially our dreams, which is the path to understanding magic.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I will just have to take your word on that.
